content: react-hook-form 7.80.0 + zod 4.4.3 + @hookform/resolvers 5.4.0. Pattern: define z.object schema, infer type with z.infer, use useForm<T>({ resolver: zodResolver(schema) }), register inputs, handleSubmit only fires with valid data. Zod errors surface via formState.errors. Controller component for controlled inputs like selects, date pickers. shadcn/ui Form components wrap this pattern with accessible labels and error messages.
